system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_mauson_getbyorder2","body":"	
CREATE   PROCEDURE [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_SON3_MAUSON_GETBYORDER2]
(
	@donhang NVARCHAR(MAX),
	@uv int = 0
)
AS
BEGIN
	-- DECLARE @donhang NVARCHAR(MAX) = 'DQH-240, DQH-241'
	SELECT A.item_number, B.mausac, SUM(A.order_qty) AS soluong_donhang
	INTO #DONHANG_SANXUAT
	FROM tr_order_detail A INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
	WHERE A.order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM STRING_SPLIT(@donhang, ','))
	GROUP BY A.item_number, B.mausac

	SELECT A1.mausac, A1.matson, A1.tenmatson, A1.stt_buoc, A1.buoc, A1.donhot,
		dinhluong_buoc = A1.soluong,
		thanhtien_buoc = A1.thanhtien,

		dinhluong_matson = SUM(A1.soluong) OVER (PARTITION BY A1.mausac, A1.matson),
		thanhtien_matson = SUM(A1.thanhtien) OVER (PARTITION BY A1.mausac, A1.matson)
	FROM (
		SELECT A.mausac, A.matson, D.ten AS tenmatson, A.stt_buoc, A.buoc, A.donhot, 
			SUM(A.soluong) AS soluong, 
			SUM(A.soluong * A.dongia) AS thanhtien
		FROM (
			SELECT C.mausac, A.matson, A.stt_buoc, A.buoc, A.donhot, A.mact, A.soluong, D.dongia
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
			INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.matson = B.matson
			INNER JOIN #DONHANG_SANXUAT C ON A.masp = C.item_number
			INNER JOIN tr_material D ON A.mact = D.mavt
			WHERE A.makhuvuc = 'SON' AND A.soluong * B.metvuong > 0
				AND CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.tinhtrang_uv, '') = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END = @uv
			GROUP BY C.mausac, A.matson, A.stt_buoc, A.buoc, A.donhot, A.mact, A.soluong, D.dongia
		) A LEFT JOIN tr_common D ON A.matson = D.ma AND D.phanloai = 5
		GROUP BY A.mausac, A.matson, D.ten, A.stt_buoc, A.buoc, A.donhot
	) A1
	ORDER BY A1.mausac, A1.matson, A1.stt_buoc
	DROP TABLE #DONHANG_SANXUAT;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-window","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
